hotel.name: The Grand Palace Hotel
hotel.cancellation_policy: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in. After that, one night's charge applies.
hotel.smoking_policy: All rooms are non-smoking. Designated smoking areas are available near the pool deck.

faqs.question: What are your check-in and check-out times?
faqs.answer: Check-in is at 2:00 PM and check-out is at 12:00 PM (Noon). Early check-in and late check-out can be requested based on availability.

faqs.question: Is breakfast included?
faqs.answer: Breakfast is not included by default but can be added for ₹800 per person per day. Our rooftop restaurant offers a full buffet from 7 AM to 10:30 AM.

faqs.question: Do you have parking?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer complimentary valet parking for all guests.

faqs.question: Is there an airport shuttle?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide airport shuttle service to and from Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj International Airport. Please inform us of your flight details at least 24 hours in advance.

faqs.question: What is your cancellation policy?
faqs.answer: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before check-in. After that, one night's charge applies as a cancellation fee.

faqs.question: Do you have a swimming pool?
faqs.answer: Yes, our outdoor swimming pool is open from 6 AM to 10 PM. Towels are provided complimentarily.

faqs.question: How do I make a reservation?
faqs.answer: You can book directly by contacting our front desk at +91 22 1234 5678, via email at info@grandpalacehotel.com, or through our website. We also accept walk-in bookings subject to availability.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, RuPay), UPI payments, net banking, and cash.
